method.candidate_definition: positive-attribution SAE features from one Amman-over-Jordan capital graph
method.screening_estimand: capital-prompt inhibition delta minus inverse-country-prompt inhibition delta
method.primary_success_rule: capital-prompt mean delta and relation-specific mean are negative, with both bootstrap 95% confidence intervals wholly below zero

discovery.ranking_rule: Features with negative capital-prompt effects are ordered first, then by ascending relation-specific difference, capital effect, graph attribution and stable feature ID.
